Daraio Lab Research Portal

A centralized hub for managing lab resources — from equipment and chemicals to ongoing projects and high-value instruments. Use the tabs above to navigate between sections.

Caltech · Daraio Research Group

📌 Announcements

No announcements yet.
⚠️ Chemical Expiry Alerts

⚠️ Low Stock Alerts

Portal Sections

⚙️

Equipment Inventory

Track all lab equipment including name, model, serial number, location, quantity, and availability status. Add, edit, or remove items at any time.

● Active
🧪

Chemical Inventory

Manage all chemicals in the lab with safety information, storage type, expiration dates, chemical formulas, and SDS links or uploaded safety documents.

● Active
📁

Projects

Track ongoing and completed research projects with sample notes, storage locations, owner info, and automatic 7-year retention alerts.

● Active
🔬

Instruments

A dedicated section for high-value instruments requiring formal training. Includes user manuals, training requirements, and booking information.

● Active
🧬

Sample Tracking

Log physical samples with storage location, owner, project, and retention date.

● Active
📚

Document Library

Lab protocols, SOPs, safety documents, and onboarding materials all in one place.

● Active
👥

Lab Members

Directory of current Daraio Research Group members with roles and contact info.

● Active
💎

High-Value Items

A registry of high-value lab assets with estimated values, insurance info, and asset tags. Visible to all, editable by admins only.

● Active
🔐

Admin Panel

Manage registered users, view change history across all sections, configure portal settings, and generate QR codes for instruments.

Admin Only
